title: Shriek
description: The first time this creature's HP reaches [blue]50%[/blue] or below, it becomes [gold]Stunned[/gold].
notes: This power triggers once when the owner's HP falls to or below the Amount threshold (typically 50% of max HP). When triggered, the owner is stunned and the power is removed immediately. The Counter stack type indicates this power tracks remaining activations. Allows negative stacks.
